modelInfo.name: POC Competitors AI Ready
modelInfo.description: Comprehensive model for analyzing competitor activities, market positioning, and competitive landscape intelligence in the aviation industry

comparisonSummary.status: Complete metadata with all expected elements

columns.name: RPKs
columns.description: Revenue passenger per Kilometre. Key airline industry metric that measures the total revenue passenger sold over a given distance.

columns.name: Passenger Revenue
columns.description: Total revenue generated from passenger ticket sales.

columns.name: Block Hours
columns.description: Total elapsed time of an aircraft's commercial operation, measured from the moment the aircraft first moves from its departure parking position (block-off or off-blocks) for the purpose of flight, until it comes to a complete stop at its arrival parking position (block-on or on-blocks) at the destination airport.

columns.name: Seats
columns.description: The total number of passenger seats available on an aircraft or within an airline’s fleet. This KPI reflects the airline’s capacity to carry passengers and is a fundamental measure for planning, revenue management, and operational performance.

columns.name: Sectors
columns.description: Total number of flight segments operated by the airline within a given period.

columns.name: Ownership Costs
columns.description: Expenses associated with owning aircraft, including depreciation and leasing costs.

columns.name: Other Revenue
columns.description: Income generated from sources other than passenger and cargo operations.

columns.name: Total Revenue
columns.description: The total income generated by an airline or aviation company from all sources, including passenger fares, cargo services, ancillary services (e.g., baggage fees, in-flight sales), and other operational activities. It represents the overall earnings before any expenses are deducted.

columns.name: Fuel Costs
columns.description: Total expenditure on fuel used for airline operations.

columns.name: Passengers
columns.description: The total number of paying or revenue-generating passengers transported by an airline over a specific period or on a specific flight. This KPI is a primary indicator of demand, airline activity, and operational performance.

columns.name: Total Expenditure on Operations
columns.description: Sum of all operational expenses incurred by the airline.

columns.name: Supplier Costs
columns.description: Costs incurred from third-party suppliers for goods and services.

columns.name: ASKs
columns.description: Available Seats per Kilometre. Key airline industry metric that measures the total passenger seating capacity available over a given distance.

columns.name: Cargo Revenue
columns.description: The total income generated from transporting freight, mail, and other cargo on an airline's flights. It includes revenue from dedicated cargo flights as well as belly cargo transported on passenger aircraft.

columns.name: Employee Costs
columns.description: Total expenses related to employee compensation, including salaries, benefits, and other labor costs.

columns.name: Status
columns.description: Generic status field.

columns.name: Opco
columns.description: Operating company identifier.

columns.name: Year
columns.description: Year of record.

columns.name: Quarter
columns.description: Quarter of record.

columns.name: %Cash 12m Revenue
columns.description: Percentage of cash and cash equivalents relative to 12-month revenue.

columns.name: Cash and cash equivalents
columns.description: Total cash and liquid assets available to the airline.

columns.name: Net debt
columns.description: Measures a company's total debt position, factoring in its cash and cash equivalents. It gives an indication of how much debt an airline or aviation company has after accounting for available liquidity.

columns.name: Net debt/EBITDA
columns.description: Ratio of net debt to EBITDA, indicating leverage.

columns.name: Flights_15D
columns.description: Number of flights departing within 15 minutes of scheduled time.

columns.name: Flights_180A
columns.description: Number of flights arriving within 180 minutes of scheduled time.

columns.name: Flights
columns.description: Total number of flights scheduled by the airline within a selected period. This KPI reflects the airline’s planned flight activity over that timeframe.

columns.name: Flights_D
columns.description: Number of flights departed.

columns.name: Flights_A
columns.description: Number of flights arrived.

columns.name: Cancellations
columns.description: Total number of flights cancelled less than 48 hours before the scheduled departure date. This KPI reflects the airline’s short-notice cancellations, which can impact operational planning and passenger experience.

columns.name: Date
columns.description: Date of record.

columns.name: CURRENCY
columns.description: Currency code.

columns.name: OPCO
columns.description: Operating company identifier.

columns.name: SUBUNIT
columns.description: Currency subunit.

columns.name: Date
columns.description: Calendar date.

columns.name: Year
columns.description: Year value.

columns.name: MonthNumber
columns.description: Month number.

columns.name: Day
columns.description: Day value.

columns.name: Quarter
columns.description: Quarter value.

columns.name: Airline Code
columns.description: Unique airline code.

columns.name: Airline Name
columns.description: Name of the airline.

columns.name: Ariline Type
columns.description: Type of airline.

columns.name: Continent
columns.description: Continent of operation.

columns.name: Country
columns.description: Country of operation.

columns.name: IAG Region
columns.description: IAG region.

columns.name: Group Name
columns.description: Name of the airline group.

columns.name: OpCo Type
columns.description: Type of operating company.

measures.name: _EBIT
measures.description: Profit from operations before deducting interest and tax.
measures.expression: CALCULATE( SUM('POC Data'[Total Revenue]) - SUM('POC Data'[Total Expenditure on Operations]) ) / 1000000

measures.name: _ASKs
measures.description: Available Seats per Kilometre. Key airline industry metric that measures the total passenger seating capacity available over a given distance.

measures.name: _Seats
measures.description: The total number of passenger seats available on an aircraft or within an airline’s fleet. This KPI reflects the airline’s capacity to carry passengers and is a fundamental measure for planning, revenue management, and operational performance

measures.name: _Sectors
measures.description: Total number of flight segments operated by the airline within a given period.

measures.name: _Block Hours
measures.description: Total elapsed time of an aircraft's commercial operation, measured from the moment the aircraft first moves from its departure parking position (block-off or off-blocks) for the purpose of flight, until it comes to a complete stop at its arrival parking position (block-on or on-blocks) at the destination airport.

measures.name: _Passengers
measures.description: The total number of paying or revenue-generating passengers transported by an airline over a specific period or on a specific flight. This KPI is a primary indicator of demand, airline activity, and operational performance

measures.name: _RPKs
measures.description: Revenue passenger per Kilometre. Key airline industry metric that measures the total revenue passenger sold over a given distance.

measures.name: _Cargo Revenue
measures.description: The total income generated from transporting freight, mail, and other cargo on an airline's flights. It includes revenue from dedicated cargo flights as well as belly cargo transported on passenger aircraft.

measures.name: _Employee Costs
measures.description: Total expenses related to employee compensation, including salaries, benefits, and other labor costs.

measures.name: _Fuel Costs
measures.description: Total expenditure on fuel used for airline operations.

measures.name: _Other Revenue
measures.description: Income generated from sources other than passenger and cargo operations.

measures.name: _Ownership Costs
measures.description: Expenses associated with owning aircraft, including depreciation and leasing costs.

measures.name: _Passenger Revenue
measures.description: Total revenue generated from passenger ticket sales.

measures.name: _Supplier Costs
measures.description: Costs incurred from third-party suppliers for goods and services.

measures.name: _Total Expenditure on Operations
measures.description: Sum of all operational expenses incurred by the airline.

measures.name: _Total Revenue
measures.description: The total income generated by an airline or aviation company from all sources, including passenger fares, cargo services, ancillary services (e.g., baggage fees, in-flight sales), and other operational activities. It represents the overall earnings before any expenses are deducted.

measures.name: _Margin
measures.description: Profitability ratio that shows the profit that the Opco generates from its core operations in relation with the total revenues.
measures.expression: DIVIDE(CALCULATE( SUM('POC Data'[Total Revenue]) - SUM('POC Data'[Total Expenditure on Operations]) ) / 1000000,[_Total Revenue])

measures.name: _Stage Length
measures.description: Total distance traveled by an aircraft from takeoff to landing for a single flight leg.

measures.name: _Gauge
measures.description: Average number of seats per aircraft or per flight.

measures.name: _Load Factor
measures.description: Measures the percentage of available seating capacity that is filled with paying passengers. It indicates how efficiently an airline is utilising its capacity.

measures.name: _RASK
measures.description: Is the sum of the airline’s revenue values divided by the sum of ASK. Informs on the revenue generated by a single passenger’s movement per single km

measures.name: _PRASK
measures.description: Airline performance metric that measures the revenue generated from passenger operations per available seat kilometre. (Passenger Revenue per Available Seat Kilometre)

measures.name: _Other RASK
measures.description: Revenue per available seat kilometer from sources other than passenger operations.

measures.name: _CASK Fuel
measures.description: Efficiency metric that measures fuel expenses per available seat kilometre. (Cost per Available Seat Kilometre)

measures.name: _CASK Employee
measures.description: Measures operating costs per available seat kilometre, considering only labor-related costs. (Cost per Available Seat Kilometre)

measures.name: _CASK Supplier
measures.description: Measures operating costs per available seat kilometre, considering costs related to third-party services and external suppliers.  (Cost per Available Seat Kilometre)

measures.name: _CASK Ownership
measures.description: Measures operating costs per available seat kilometre, associated with aircraft ownership. (Cost per Available Seat Kilometre)

measures.name: _CASK exFuel
measures.description: Airline financial metric that measures operating costs per available seat kilometre, excluding fuel expenses. ​ (Cost per Available Seat Kilometre)

measures.name: _OTP 15D
measures.description: OnTime Performance on Departures (15 minutes) measures the proportion of flights that depart within 15 minutes of their scheduled departure time during a selected period. This KPI reflects the airline’s operational punctuality and reliability in departures. A higher OTP indicates effective flight preparation, ground handling, and adherence to the published schedule, contributing to operational efficiency and passenger satisfaction.

measures.name: _OTP 180A
measures.description: OnTime Performance on Arrival (180 minutes) measures the proportion of flights that arrive within 180 minutes of their scheduled arrival time during a selected period. Delays beyond 180 minutes are particularly relevant, as they may trigger passenger compensations. This KPI reflects the airline’s operational punctuality and reliability in arrivals. A higher OTP indicates effective flight preparation, ground handling, and adherence to the published schedule, contributing to operational efficiency and passenger satisfaction.

measures.name: _Regularity
measures.description: Regularity measures the proportion of scheduled flights that are operated (non cancelled) by the airline within a selected period. It reflects the airline’s reliability in executing its planned schedule, providing insight into operational stability and consistency. A high regularity indicates that the airline is effectively meeting its published flight commitments

measures.name: _Net debt
measures.description: Measures a company's total debt position, factoring in its cash and cash equivalents. It gives an indication of how much debt an airline or aviation company has after accounting for available liquidity.
measures.expression: VAR SelectedYear = MAX('POC Data'[Year]) VAR LatestQuarter = CALCULATE( MAX('POC Data'[Quarter]), 'POC Data'[Year] = SelectedYear ) RETURN CALCULATE( MAX('POC Data'[Net debt]), 'POC Data'[Year] = SelectedYear, 'POC Data'[Quarter] = LatestQuarter )/1000000

measures.name: _Cash and cash equivalents
measures.description: Total cash and liquid assets available to the airline.
measures.expression: VAR SelectedYear = MAX('POC Data'[Year]) VAR LatestQuarter = CALCULATE( MAX('POC Data'[Quarter]), 'POC Data'[Year] = SelectedYear ) RETURN CALCULATE( MAX('POC Data'[Cash and cash equivalents]), 'POC Data'[Year] = SelectedYear, 'POC Data'[Quarter] = LatestQuarter )/1000000

measures.name: _Net debt/EBITDA
measures.description: Ratio of net debt to EBITDA, indicating leverage.
measures.expression: VAR SelectedYear = MAX('POC Data'[Year]) VAR LatestQuarter = CALCULATE( MAX('POC Data'[Quarter]), 'POC Data'[Year] = SelectedYear ) RETURN CALCULATE( MAX('POC Data'[Net debt/EBITDA]), 'POC Data'[Year] = SelectedYear, 'POC Data'[Quarter] = LatestQuarter )

measures.name: _%Cash 12m Revenue
measures.description: Percentage of cash and cash equivalents relative to 12-month revenue.
measures.expression: VAR SelectedYear = MAX('POC Data'[Year]) VAR LatestQuarter = CALCULATE( MAX('POC Data'[Quarter]), 'POC Data'[Year] = SelectedYear ) RETURN CALCULATE( MAX('POC Data'[%Cash 12m Revenue]), 'POC Data'[Year] = SelectedYear, 'POC Data'[Quarter] = LatestQuarter )

measures.name: _CASK
measures.description: Is the sum of the airline’s cost values divided by the sum of ASK. Informs on the cost generated by a single passenger’s movement per single km

measures.name: _Cargo RASK
measures.description: Is the sum of the airline’s cargo revenue values divided by the sum of ASK. Informs on the revenue generated by a single passenger’s movement per single km

measures.name: Selected Currency
measures.description: Currently selected currency for reporting or analysis.
measures.expression: VAR SelectedOpco = SELECTEDVALUE('POC Data'[Opco]) RETURN LOOKUPVALUE( 'Currency'[CURRENCY], 'Currency'[OPCO], SelectedOpco )

measures.name: Selected Subunit
measures.description: Currently selected currency subunit for reporting or analysis.
measures.expression: VAR SelectedOpco = SELECTEDVALUE('POC Data'[Opco]) RETURN LOOKUPVALUE( 'Currency'[SUBUNIT], 'Currency'[OPCO], SelectedOpco )
